yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_ENISA_Technical_Advisory_on_Secure_Packa {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for ENISA Technical Advisory on Secure Package Managers: Essential DevSecOps Guidanc"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-03-13"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-99" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "DevSecOps" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}
